title: Create a panel with the Mixed data source

blocks.content:
The Mixed data source lets each query in a panel use a different data source. This is the foundation of multi-source querying in Grafana dashboards.

To create a panel with the Mixed data source, complete the following steps:

Click **+ Add visualization**. If you see an **Add** drawer instead, click the **Panel** card.

The panel editor opens.
In the **Queries** tab, click the **Data source** dropdown and search for `Mixed`.

Select **Mixed** from the results.

The panel editor now shows each query row with its own data source selector instead of a single global selector.
In the next milestone, you add your first query.
